calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. No appearance was made by any party or counsel.

There being no appearance, the Court dismissed the petition without prejudice.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Troylene Trammell appeared in person (pro per) (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding re-opening the matter, that there were multiple versions of the will, and that no heirs were given notice.

Parties are encouraged to get assistance from the Court Access Center or seek legal counsel.

The matter is continued to March 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.
